programme.title: E121 - Greedyguts / Where Is Bali?
programme.desc: A goat has escaped from the mountain and is coming to wreak havoc, devouring everything in its path! // Bali is nowhere to be found, and the Barbapapa deploy all their imagination to look for her. They have no idea that a nice surprise awaits them!

programme.title: E112 - A Guayabera For Tico / Falling Estrella's
programme.desc: Boots gets a Guayabera shirt as a gift for Tico, but becomes attached to it on the way to Tico's house. // Dora, Boots, and Papi want to see the Quetzal constellation dance across the sky, but it loses three stars! Dora has to get them back in time.

programme.title: E1004 - Pups Save A Windswept Polar Bear Cub / Pups Save A Drive-In
programme.desc: When a storm sends a polar bear cub to Adventure Bay, it's up to Ryder, Everest, and the pups to bring the baby bear back to its family. // The Pups must save Mayor Humdinger from a runaway movie projector at the new drive-in.

programme.title: E220 - The Barbababies Have Got Talent / Triple Switcheroo
programme.desc: Every barbababy is invited to show their greatest talent on stage. // Video games are fun, but you also need to know how to enjoy the nice weather!

programme.title: E209 - Rainforest Race / Bok Bok Birthday
programme.desc: Dora and Boots race their boxcar against Croc Racers in the Rainforest Race. / Dora and Boots secretly hand out Big Red Chicken's birthday invites to all their friends in time for his birthday party.

programme.title: E203 - Beach Scanner
programme.desc: Tim and Kai try to uncover trinkets buried at the beach.

programme.title: E744 - The Ambulance
programme.desc: Dr. Brown Bear comes to visit the playgroup and teach all of the children what to do when there's been an accident.

programme.title: E118 - Sharkdog Sitting
programme.desc: While Max is out Olivia babysits Sharkdog but she just can't keep him inside.

programme.title: E841 - Space Adventure!
programme.desc: Peppa and George are re-enacting the Apollo Moon Landing with the help of Granny Pig's historical re-enactment society. Grampy Rabbit has lent them his rocket, but no one has told him it's just pretend.

programme.title: E846 - Please And Thank You
programme.desc: Granny and Grandpa talk to Peppa and George about manners. Madame Gazelle teaches all the children about how wonderful it is to say please and thank you.

programme.title: Légendes urbaines
programme.desc: Un moment dédié pour donner la parole aux grands acteurs des cultures urbaines mondiales. Ils sont les têtes d'affiches des genres musicaux les plus écoutés aujourd'hui mais sont parfois méconnus du grand public. Une découverte de la face cachée' de ces artistes, derrière les clichés, les postures, et loin de l'actualité promotionnelle.'

programme.title: The Mystery of The Run-down Robot
programme.desc: When Gyro the robot appears to be unhappy, Addison has to figure out what's wrong with her little friend.

programme.title: Tin Can
programme.desc: Tin Tin Tin, Hepi and Briko have an unbelievable idea for these tin cans.

programme.title: Day of the Dragon
programme.desc: Ricky orders a takeaway, but will his fortune cookies' predictions come true? After making a dragon bike basket and using a pizza box as a canvas, Gavin arrives with a map to the Great Wall of Bristol to animate a monster of a picture.

programme.title: Wrist Concert Lights
programme.desc: Host Alie Ward presents wristband lights and a multifunction travel jacket with a pocket for everything. She visits a Girls App Camp teaching tech and meets the inventor of an easy way to check for a sore throat.

programme.title: Grownups
programme.desc: When Yoko misunderstands the definition of the word ‘grownup', the kids get caught in a bureaucratic loop with Yoko as a crazy boss!

programme.title: Refuse to Mow
programme.desc: It's summer, and the Grimwades are enjoying being outside. Daddy wants to mow the lawn but the family protests as they don't want him to cut the rest of the daisies. This leads them to question why Daddy has to cut the lawn at all.

programme.title: Flying Pig
programme.desc: My oh my... it's a pig in the sky! We'll show you how to make this little piggy go “weeeeeeee!”

programme.title: Snowball
programme.desc: Vik is annoyed when the snowy weather disrupts his baseball game. But Yoko makes a field of magical snowmen and the game is enjoyed by all!

programme.title: Environmental Engineers
programme.desc: Philippe learns about salmon migration, and new technology that helps in the speedy replacement of bridges. He visits a hurricane protection facility and goes to Mexico to discover the secrets of Mayan symbols.

programme.title: A Reflection on Refraction
programme.desc: Eric does a fun experiment to show how refraction plays tricks with our eyes. He learns that when we look at objects, we see the light reflected from them. Because light doesn't travel as well through water as it does through air, things in water look different to us.

programme.title: Search for the Big Seven Part 2: The Big Ones
programme.desc: A group of young adventurers continue their search for the Big Seven wild animals in Addo Elephant National Park in South Africa. They discover ancient rock art in caves and experience exciting moments with a large herd of elephants.

programme.title: Snowball
programme.desc: Vik is annoyed when the snowy weather disrupts his baseball game. But Yoko makes a field of magical snowmen and the game is enjoyed by all!

programme.title: Knights
programme.desc: Little Lewis follows every step in order to achieve his dream. After completing a plethora of thankless tasks at a young age, he moves on to the rank of ‘squire.' A chance to demonstrate his bravery on the battlefield, in order to be knighted, at last.

programme.title: Trip to Central African Republic
programme.desc: Zoe is grumpy about babysitting her little sister. Alim suggests Milo take over, but he protests, saying babysitting is a girl's job. Alim takes them to the Central African Republic, where Yamba shows that among the Aka, men care for babies.

programme.title: Positive Thoughts Only
programme.desc: DiktaThor finds out he has new telepathic powers. By using his negative thoughts, he can wither Bumble's flowers. Only Sprinter can come and save the day turning DiktaThor's negative thoughts into positive ones.

programme.title: Recycling Romp
programme.desc: Boss, Blister and Scab toss old objects in Granny Pina's garden to annoy the Buffycats, but it's Creative Recycling Day and our furry fellows use them to build toys for the park! Will the evil cats wreck our furry fellows' creative plan?

programme.title: Lab Results
programme.desc: Trapped underground with the neurotic Bruno and with no cell phone reception, the gang must combine their scientific knowledge to save themselves or be lost forever.

programme.title: Rainy Day Fun
programme.desc: After a day of mud sliding, the kids have to problem solve when heavy rain endangers some of the Kiwifruit Valley creatures.

programme.title: Extraordinary Energy
programme.desc: The doctors reveal the incredible energy stores that make your body work around the clock. We are going to meet a super-smelling Brilliant Body whose nose can sniff out cancer and get more answers to some medical questions.

programme.title: Circle of Life
programme.desc: Eric uses a hula hoop to explore nature and create a special research area teeming with life. Using the hoop helps him identify, count and keep track of the tiny creatures and plants he finds.

programme.title: Party Like it's 1859
programme.desc: When the team's high-tech dance party is threatened by a power outage, they're frustrated and fly off to find a place where things are still normal. Mistakenly, they end up at a historic village, where they live like it's 150 years ago!

programme.title: Team Doki's Big Squeeze
programme.desc: When the team wants a new water slide for the clubhouse beach, they decide to fund it by selling Anabella's delicious lemonade. But the slide costs a lot, and they want it fast! So how can they sell as much lemonade as possible? They split into two teams.

programme.title: Focus
programme.desc: Keep up with the latest news from all over the globe with Focus on France 24. Focus programme provides exclusive reports from Monday to Friday at 7.50 am Paris time. programme.desc: A behind-the-scenes look at manufacturers uncovers why bowling balls are so heavy, how tools are wired for power, how shock absorbers are made for teeth.

programme.desc: Hawking considers one of the most important mysteries facing humankind, the possibility of aliens. He leads us on a journey rendered in eye-popping detail.

programme.title: Remembering Leslie: The Intellectual Trio
programme.desc: Taiwanese detective Simon visits Hong Kong and is served by Wing, the young and witty cop. Their adventures begin when they encounter two pretty girls, Pretty eyes and Slant eyes. These two girls are pickpockets and have stolen a jade from the professional killer. The killer is desperate to get back his treasure, that even though the detectives try to protect the sisters, the four are in great danger...

programme.title: Devil touch
programme.desc: Office worker Amy goes berserk and tries to stab her boss, Cheuk, accusing him of sexual harassment and rape. The higher-ups accept Amy's description of the event and Cheuk is suspended, in spite of the fact that in-house lawyer Joe believes the man is innocent...

programme.title: The Intellectual Trio
programme.desc: Taiwanese detective Simon visits Hong Kong and is served by Wing, the young and witty cop. Their adventures begin when they encounter two pretty girls, Pretty eyes and Slant eyes. These two girls are pickpockets and have stolen a jade from the professional killer. The killer is desperate to get back his treasure, that even though the detectives try to protect the sisters, the four are in great danger...

programme.title: E4 - Dying Hard
programme.desc: John McLain (Bruce Willis) finds himself dangling from the side of a building. The only way to save himself is to shoot through the glass window and break through to safety. Using the same Beretta 92 handgun, we reconstruct the office glass and see if our host can break through.

programme.title: E3 - The Payoff
programme.desc: The rainy season begins and the problems escalate. The team must devise new strategies to safeguard the equipment and prevent it from being washed away by the daily thunderstorms.

programme.title: E13 - Food
programme.desc: In this food-filled episode, Catfish throws up all over the world. The biking duo try various forms of genitalia including bull testicle, tiger and sea penis, virgin eggs, otherwise known as pee billed eggs, and more. They try duck head in China and worm tequila and mosquito eggs in Mexico. The question becomes, can you keep it down while watching this special episode?

programme.title: E14 - Columbia
programme.desc: Catfish and Rooftop go on a mission with the Colombian military's anti-narcotics division, test bulletproof clothing on themselves and experience the most painful insect sting in the world.

programme.title: Razor
programme.desc: CGTN's brand new science and technology show, covering cutting edge developments from all over the world. RAZOR will show you the world's most powerful laser and the world's smallest anti-cancer treatment. It will take you from the weird world of quantum computing to the boundaries of the cosmos. An international team of reporters will follow the guidance of Occam's Razor - the principle that the simplest explanation is the best one. RAZOR will show that we are already ''living in the future'!

programme.title: Leaders Talk
programme.desc: Leaders Talk is China Media Group's new current affairs program featuring one-on-one interviews with heads of state and high-ranking government officials and heads of international organizations. They will share their insights on the major events shaping today's world, providing an international viewpoint to understand our times, the visions we share, the challenges we face and the efforts we can make for a better future.

programme.title: E14 - It's Time/Appreciation Day
programme.desc: Mordecai becomes extremely jealous when Rigby manages to get a date with Margaret. Mordecai tries to prevent Rigby from getting to his date on time by destroying all the clocks they have.

programme.title: E1151 - Open Door Policy/Pure Protein
programme.desc: Still shipwrecked on a desert island, the Titans try to find food but stumble upon dinosaurs instead.

programme.title: E1 - Home Movie/Fish Sitting/The Cruise/Coconut Shy/Green Bean
programme.desc: Mr Bean makes his own horror movie and ropes in Mrs Wicket as the star!

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: British comedian Griff Rhys Jones begin his epic 'off-highway' journey of New Zealand from north to south, starting at Cape Reinga and travelling via Russell and Kaipara Harbour to Auckland.

programme.title: E6
programme.desc: Ash Dykes ends his journey at Jiayuguan, visits Crescent Moon Lake, meets Mr. Dong at Yardang, and concludes at Yumenguan Fortress, marking the Great Han Wall's end.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE delivers the latest from Japan, Asia, and the rest of the world. While covering wide network of correspondents breaking news and developing stories, offering a perspective from this corner of the globe, a team of trusted anchors ties it all together to give you a picture of what's happening now, and what's ahead.

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: For the first challenge, the twelve contestants of this fourteenth brigade must draw inspiration from the arrival of spring. On the menu: a lamb dish with all-green sides.

programme.title: E2 - Ground Meats
programme.desc: Quebec's culinary heritage wouldn't be the same without ground meat. To honor this often-misunderstood ingredient, we invite Nathalie Simard, Jean-Sebastien Girard, and chefs Marc Maula and Amine Laabi.

programme.title: E10 - In Savoie, With Jean-Marc Genereux
programme.desc: Mory Sacko is at the Chateau Saint-Michel d'Avully, in Savoie, with dancer and choreographer Jean-Marc Genereux. On today's menu: Abondance cheese risotto.

programme.title: E3 - Unusual Museums
programme.desc: Among the two hundred museums in the city of Paris, some are more confidential than others and belong to brands, associations, or private collectors. Yvan Hallouin explores the most surprising of them.

programme.title: E7 - Terroirs Of Excellence In Franche-Comte, From The Jura Mountains To The Mon
programme.desc: From watchmakers to cooks to jewellers to guides: these enthusiasts protect and celebrate their region from the plateaus of the Jura mountains to the Montbeliard region. Turned towards nature and protection of natural resources, they also seek to promote the know-how of skilled tradesmen passed on from generation to generation.

programme.title: E81
programme.desc: The magazine programme all about the art of living in Monaco, Provence and on the Cote d'Azur.

programme.title: E21 - In Caen (1)
programme.desc: Flavie Flament goes to Caen, to the market, to meet its inhabitants. Today, she focuses on the city's famous tripe and its architecture.

programme.title: E1 - The Wacky World of Winston & Orphle!
programme.desc: Welcome to the wacky world of Winston & Orphle! First, Winston tricks a Magic Pet into growing his robots of Mila & Morphle big enough to steal the entire Magic Pet Center! Then, Orphle causes trouble on his own when he runs away with the cake Mila made for her & Morphle's Matchiversary. The two troublemakers team up to try & get their hands on a special surprise gift, but it's up to Mila & Morphle to stop them!

programme.title: E2 - When Cute Creatures Cause Big Chaos!
programme.desc: Watch out, because these cute creatures are causing big chaos! First, Chroma the Magic Pet has a cold, & every time she sneezes, she causes a huge color splat! Mila & Morphle must find her before the whole city is covered in color. Then, the Baby Morphles arrive from another dimension & they are in the mood for a game of chase! From a giant living doll to a runaway magic pet, these cute creatures are causing chaos everywhere!

programme.title: E3 - Siblings Month: Creative Play Fun!
programme.desc: Get creative with JJ & his siblings! TomTom leads his lab assistants JJ & YoYo in fun science experiments, like making slime & a volcano! Then, YoYo teaches JJ how to make the perfect peanut butter & jelly sandwich. The creative fun continues as they record cool sounds with a cassette player, pretend to be a train & play a game of 'The Floor is Lava' in the living room! It's a month of imagination & creativity!

programme.title: E1 - The Wacky World of Winston & Orphle!
programme.desc: Welcome to the wacky world of Winston & Orphle! First, Winston tricks a Magic Pet into growing his robots of Mila & Morphle big enough to steal the entire Magic Pet Center! Then, Orphle causes trouble on his own when he runs away with the cake Mila made for her & Morphle's Matchiversary. The two troublemakers team up to try & get their hands on a special surprise gift, but it's up to Mila & Morphle to stop them!

programme.title: E13 - Siblings Month: Helping Out!
programme.desc: Celebrate Siblings Month by helping out! First, JJ assumes the role of a pretend doctor, taking care of TomTom & YoYo with a checkup & lollipops. Then, the siblings team up with Daddy to bake a special cake for Mom! The helpfulness continues as they wash a dirty car together after a soccer game & TomTom helps JJ learn to use the potty. Plus, join the family on a nature walk with Bingo to learn about animals & nature!

programme.title: E1 - A Day of Food, Play & Learning!
programme.desc: Join the kids for a day of food, play & learning! First, Grandma Panda bakes some cupcakes while Mia & Bari role-play as bakers in their own pretend kitchen & play a game of pat-a-cake. Then, it's time for a teddy bear's picnic with a whole variety of different tasty treats! The learning continues as Daddy & Twinkle show Max how to say hello with a wave before going into town to wave hello to all their friends. It's a fun-filled, yummy day!

programme.title: E3 - Siblings Month: Creative Play Fun!
programme.desc: Get creative with JJ & his siblings! TomTom leads his lab assistants JJ & YoYo in fun science experiments, like making slime & a volcano! The creative fun continues as they record cool sounds with a cassette player, pretend to be a train & play a game of 'The Floor is Lava' in the living room! It's a month of imagination & creativity!

programme.title: E1 - Orphle's Big Day of Trouble!
programme.desc: It's a big day of trouble, all thanks to Orphle! First, he uses a Multicolour Cloner to make different colored clones of himself, & it's up to Mila & Morphle to track them all down before they cause too much chaos. Then, when the friends are playing in a cardboard castle, Orphle mistakenly thinks they don't want to play with him & attacks it! From stealing a treasure map to teaming up with Winston, Orphle is causing trouble all day!

programme.title: E5 - Justice For Mary
programme.desc: When Mary Scott is found murdered in her San Diego home in 1969, a case with few leads quickly loses steam. Years later, Mary's daughters grow determined to find answers about the mother they barely knew.

programme.title: E106 - Vengeance
programme.desc: A man shoots four people in broad daylight, leaving Tulsa detectives, attorneys, and everyone impacted struggling to explain his mental state.

programme.title: E5 - Justice For Mary
programme.desc: When Mary Scott is found murdered in her San Diego home in 1969, a case with few leads quickly loses steam. Years later, Mary's daughters grow determined to find answers about the mother they barely knew.

programme.title: E106 - Vengeance
programme.desc: A man shoots four people in broad daylight, leaving Tulsa detectives, attorneys, and everyone impacted struggling to explain his mental state.

programme.title: E6
programme.desc: A prison librarian is held hostage by a desperate inmate who holds a shank to his neck; a motorcyclist and his girlfriend are attacked in the street; a porch pirate is busted; and more.

programme.title: E14
programme.desc: A robber and a jewellery store owner get into a Wild West-style shootout; a stay-at-home mom confronts a coffee shop clerk who used her credit card; a father and son duo fight back against a robbery.

programme.title: E3 - Murderous Mother Or Protective Parent?
programme.desc: A violent assault ends in a fatal stabbing when a young mother kills her boyfriend to defend her child. Considered innocent by police for four years, she was re-arrested and faces up to 41 years in prison.

programme.title: E2 - Freeway Shooter Or Innocent Father?
programme.desc: A 21-year-old man is charged with domestic terrorism after a spree of shootings on the freeway sends the public into panic. Facing over 100 years in prison, the young father claims he has an alibi.

programme.title: E3 - Murderous Mother Or Protective Parent?
programme.desc: A violent assault ends in a fatal stabbing when a young mother kills her boyfriend to defend her child. Considered innocent by police for four years, she was re-arrested and faces up to 41 years in prison.

programme.title: E6
programme.desc: A prison librarian is held hostage by a desperate inmate who holds a shank to his neck; a motorcyclist and his girlfriend are attacked in the street; a porch pirate is busted; and more.

programme.desc: A robber and a jewellery store owner get into a Wild West-style shootout; a stay-at-home mom confronts a coffee shop clerk who used her credit card; a father and son duo fight back against a robbery.

E10 - 討論愛情裡的信任與分寸
programme.desc: 《非誠勿擾》回歸經典規則。男嘉賓登場後，將通過「愛之請回答」「愛之再判斷」「愛之終決選」三個環節與24位女嘉賓互相了解，還有根據大數據匹配的「智推女生」參與最終決選。陳銘、黃瀾加盟「非誠合夥人」，以全新視角解讀愛情。

programme.title: E12 - 走進烏江寨的衣食住行
programme.desc: 以「山河即課堂，行走即成長」為主題，由何廣智、劉奕君、李雅娟、孫藝洲、楊超越組成的「非來游學團」踏入內蒙古的草原、沙漠、礦洞與峽谷，完成了一場真實、鮮活、不設腳本的人文探索，開啟一場兼具治愈感與知識性的旅程。

programme.title: E3 - Chateau Malartic-Lagraviere
programme.desc: Located in Leognan in the Gironde, Chateau Malartic-Lagraviere is a grand cru classe de Graves. programme.title: Tao Po[Live]
programme.desc: 'Tao Po' is a compelling Current Affairs program that uncovers the lives of the 'real people' behind the headlines, offering intimate interviews and insightful glimpses into their personal journeys and the issues they represent.

programme.title: TV Patrol Regional
programme.desc: Filipinos around the world hope to immigrate to the US, legalize their status in the US, or be reunited with their family in the US after years of separation. In this public service program, Attorney Michael J Gurfinkel explains, in plain English, the intricacies of US immigration laws and procedures, as well as advises of avenues to immigrate and developments in US immigration laws. Just because you're half a world away from home, you can still get answers to your US immigration questions.

programme.title: Juan Conversations With Rose Eclarinal
programme.desc: The show highlights the personal journeys, challenges and truimphs of ordinary and extraordinary overseas Filipinos. Produced and hosted by Rose Eclarinal

programme.title: Pamilya Sagrado
programme.desc: A gripping family drama and political thriller set in the world of Freemasonry and fraternity hazing. The Sagrado family, a powerful political clan, faces moral dilemmas and scandals that threaten their reputation and unity. As secrets unravel, they must choose between protecting their name and staying true to their principles, all while navigating corruption, loyalty, and betrayal.

programme.title: Masters Of Cantonese Cuisine
programme.desc: Masters of Cantonese Cuisine is a documentary on Lingnan (Guangdong) delicacies culture, originally created by Shenzhen Satellite TV. This is a brief history of food belonging to the Greater Bay Area, a history of customs and culture that belongs exclusively to Guangdong. The program focus on the local Guangdong delicacies, and led by a “delicacy searcher”, walking through streets in search of local specialities, visiting masters of Cantonese cuisines, and sharing unique tasting commentaries. In the meantime, the reflection on delicacies would be brought back to live studio, and two observers who are proficient in Cantonese cuisine cultures will have chats on tasting. From a spoon and a drop, it will extend to the taste of life and origin of culture embedded in the delicacies.

programme.title: Reveal Time
programme.desc: The prospective touch the nature and human history and future, such as technology and occult in all areas. Through detailed data collection and interpretation of strict logic and reasoning, with the audience close to the truth behind the events, it prys into the mysteries of the magical world.

The program focus on the local Guangdong delicacies, and led by a “delicacy searcher”, walking through streets in search of local specialities, visiting masters of Cantonese cuisines, and sharing unique tasting commentaries. In the meantime, the reflection on delicacies would be brought back to live studio, and two observers who are proficient in Cantonese cuisine cultures will have chats on tasting. From a spoon and a drop, it will extend to the taste of life and origin of culture embedded in the delicacies.

programme.desc: Octopus is considered a delicacy - grilled, boiled, or fried. But rising demand has consequences, and in several regions of Europe, this intelligent cephalopod is already considered overfished.

programme.title: Astrosara - Training With Spain's First Female Astronaut
programme.desc: In Spain she's a media star. Known as AstroSara on YouTube, Sara Garcia Alonso is a science communicator, author, molecular biologist - and future ESA reserve astronaut. We accompany her as she prepares for the job.

programme.title: Relative Or Foe? - Neanderthals And Us
programme.desc: Although they were physically superior to us, Neanderthals did not prevail. What made them different and why did they become extinct? How close or hostile were they to modern man?

programme.title: E4
programme.desc: 日本最大的財閥集團「加賀美集團」的CEO，也是一位天才發明家，加賀美零隱藏自己的身份，潛入私立絵都學園，成為了一名高中教師。該校的3年0班是一個集合了被認為「無幹勁、無才能、無前途」的學生，被學校其他部分貶低為「零組」。加賀美零將在這樣的環境中，與這些學生共同成長，挑戰教育常規。

programme.title: E7
programme.desc: 女急救醫生杏野朱羅(松本若菜)有著出色的醫療技術，甚至能夠同時為兩名重症患者進行高難度手術，以致被稱為「阿修羅醫生」，她從不考慮醫院的利益，亦不會顧忌上級，只會專注拯救眼前的患者，即使對方身無分文又或者是黑道成員，都堅信要絕對幫助他們！

programme.title: E8
programme.desc: 故事從東京發生的一連串慘烈連環殺人案展開，而案件現場讓兩名記者的命運交織在一起。設樂浩暉（志尊淳）是週刊雜誌的知名自由撰稿人，筒井萬琴則是電視台新聞節目導播（岸井雪乃），敏銳且富有正義感。兩人因追蹤同一起案件而相識，並在攜手調查的過程中逐漸被彼此吸引。然而，隨著調查的深入，浩暉的身分卻越來越可疑，他的過去與案件的關聯也逐漸浮出水面──他，究竟是無辜的旁觀者，還是那個令人聞風喪膽的連環殺人犯？

programme.title: E10
programme.desc: 晴原柑九朗作為SDM本部首席代表兼氣象研究員利用智慧與知識，冒著生命危險站在最前線，保護人們的性命免受巨大氣象災害威脅，為使命奮鬥的故事。​

programme.title: E24
programme.desc: 職業為遺傳基因研究員的韓素珍十分相信基因會默默指引人的命運及人生，更認為遺傳基因隱藏著尋找真愛的秘密。在一個平安夜韓素珍和男友分手，一個人失落並醉倒街頭，卻意外把生髮水倒在婦產科醫生沈延宇身上，展開一段命運般的戀情。

programme.title: E24
programme.desc: 職業為遺傳基因研究員的韓素珍十分相信基因會默默指引人的命運及人生，更認為遺傳基因隱藏著尋找真愛的秘密。在一個平安夜韓素珍和男友分手，一個人失落並醉倒街頭，卻意外把生髮水倒在婦產科醫生沈延宇身上，展開一段命運般的戀情。

programme.title: E8 - Southeast Asia
programme.desc: With real-life dueling dragons, giant sumo-wrestling beetles, street-fighting monkeys, and sea turtles that play king of the hill – on top of another sea turtle, Southeast Asia boasts a wide range of wildlife warriors.

programme.title: E1 - Ghosts of Cederberg
programme.desc: A rocky landscape, carved over eons by wind, water and fire, these are the Cederberg Mountains of South Africa. These imposing peaks are home to an incredible diversity of plants and animals. But there are some here that remain unseen, lurking in the shadows and ready to strike at any time...

programme.title: E2 - Namib: Land Of Extremes
programme.desc: The Namib Desert is a land of extremes, from icy ocean to baking sand. It takes toughness and adaptation to live in this desert, and only a special few can. From the sidewinding adder to the fog-collecting beetle, each animal has their tricks for survival in the Namib.

programme.title: E5 - Return to the Wild
programme.desc: The Eastern Cape Province is investing heavily in ecotourism and conservation as an alternative to fishing and commercial development. The region is reclaiming farmlands and closing fishing grounds for wildlife. This is one of the most exciting conservation success stories in Africa.

programme.title: E1 - The Woodland Troop
programme.desc: In this small patch of woodland, two young monkeys face the toughest time of their lives. As they find their place in the world, they must learn which neighbors are allies, and which are foes. Who to trust, and who to avoid. They will suffer loss, and gain friends, as they discover what it means to be part of the Woodland Troop.

programme.title: E2 - Connections
programme.desc: Follow scientists and Traditional Owners as they map out ecological links, migratory pathways, and interspecies bonds that conserve Ningaloo’s biodiversity. Frolic with whales, float among seaweed islands, and see archaeologists nix a settler myth.

programme.title: E2 - Connections
programme.desc: Follow scientists and Traditional Owners as they map out ecological links, migratory pathways, and interspecies bonds that conserve Ningaloo’s biodiversity. Frolic with whales, float among seaweed islands, and see archaeologists nix a settler myth.

programme.title: E1 - Insect Apocalypse
programme.desc: Look at what a global insect decline could do to our planet. Uncover our historical dependence on these tiny animals, the vital roles they play in our ecosystems, and the reasons why our fragile relationship to them is in danger worldwide.

programme.title: E2 - Life Givers
programme.desc: Learn how bees, butterflies, moths, and other pollinators keep our fields and forests fruitful, and weigh what life would be like if these busy bugs vanished. Witness a mysterious butterfly pilgrimage and a moth’s clever way of escaping hungry bats.

programme.title: E1 - Jungle Killers
programme.desc: A jaguar stalks the riverbank. A venomous snake is on the move. A Colombian tarantula waits for night fall. Watch as these fierce predators prowl through the jungle and bite into their next great meal.

programme.title: Woodpeckers: The Hole Story
programme.desc: March to the steady drumbeat of a unique avian family. Learn why the world’s 239 woodpecker species, from massive to minute, are nature’s best lumberjacks; explore their flying, climbing, and calling skills; and get a look inside their secret nests.

programme.title: E1 - Insect Apocalypse
programme.desc: Look at what a global insect decline could do to our planet. Uncover our historical dependence on these tiny animals, the vital roles they play in our ecosystems, and the reasons why our fragile relationship to them is in danger worldwide.

programme.desc: A jaguar stalks the riverbank. A venomous snake is on the move. A Colombian tarantula waits for night fall. Watch as these fierce predators prowl through the jungle and bite into their next great meal.

programme.desc: March to the steady drumbeat of a unique avian family. Learn why the world’s 239 woodpecker species, from massive to minute, are nature’s best lumberjacks; explore their flying, climbing, and calling skills; and get a look inside their secret nests.

programme.title: E8 - Southeast Asia
programme.desc: With real-life dueling dragons, giant sumo-wrestling beetles, street-fighting monkeys, and sea turtles that play king of the hill – on top of another sea turtle, Southeast Asia boasts a wide range of wildlife warriors.

programme.title: E1 - Ghosts of Cederberg
programme.desc: A rocky landscape, carved over eons by wind, water and fire, these are the Cederberg Mountains of South Africa. These imposing peaks are home to an incredible diversity of plants and animals. But there are some here that remain unseen, lurking in the shadows and ready to strike at any time...

programme.title: E2 - Namib: Land Of Extremes
programme.desc: The Namib Desert is a land of extremes, from icy ocean to baking sand. It takes toughness and adaptation to live in this desert, and only a special few can. From the sidewinding adder to the fog-collecting beetle, each animal has their tricks for survival in the Namib.

programme.title: E5 - Return to the Wild
programme.desc: The Eastern Cape Province is investing heavily in ecotourism and conservation as an alternative to fishing and commercial development. The region is reclaiming farmlands and closing fishing grounds for wildlife. This is one of the most exciting conservation success stories in Africa.

programme.title: E1 - The Woodland Troop
programme.desc: In this small patch of woodland, two young monkeys face the toughest time of their lives. As they find their place in the world, they must learn which neighbors are allies, and which are foes. Who to trust, and who to avoid. They will suffer loss, and gain friends, as they discover what it means to be part of the Woodland Troop.

E29
programme.desc: 消防局長宋焰（楊洋飾）和急診科醫生許沁（王楚然飾）分別十年之後重逢，青春時代的兩人因家庭反對被迫分開，再相見時，兩人都有了許多成長和改變。由於工作性質的原因，宋焰和許沁漸漸有了交集。宋焰帶領十里台的消防員們為維護人民生命財產安全而英勇奮鬥，經歷了無數次血與火的生死考驗後仍不改初心。他的堅持感染著許沁，困擾他們多年的心結也漸漸被解開。兩人克服家庭阻力，最後重新走到一起，互相鼓勵，共同進步，用各自的專長守護著這座美麗的城市。

programme.title: E10
programme.desc: 謝盈萱等原班人馬回歸出演，天心加盟飾演新角色。 40歲的陳嘉玲從天龍國回到家鄉台南，展開人生下半場。第一件要努力的事就是靠自己的雙手，把買下的鬼屋變成家。但一開始就發生一連串意外，摔傷、被蜜蜂叮，還坐輪椅進了醫院……新的一季看陳嘉玲如何用盡全力，開始書寫另一段人生篇章。

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: 侯文詠原著小說改編，兩段糾結的情感，交織出一場關於「選擇」的情愛旅程。

programme.title: E1285
programme.desc: The best tunes in Korea! the most sensational music show on TV satisfies all your senses! Fantastic performances and Awe-inspiring harmony by the nation's top musicians! Follow the latest trend in the Korean music scene through the K-chart, a summary of the week's hottest songs.

programme.title: E13
programme.desc: In Onjeong Market, located in Onjeong, a town some distance away from Seoul, the area is buzzing with change as apartment complexes are built and plans for subway extensions and new town developments are announced. Across a single street stand a principled general hospital, Gongmyeongjeongdae Clinic, and traditional Korean clinic, Yangji Barun Clinic. The two families who run these places have been bitter enemies for years, bound by a long standing grudge from an incident in the past. Even the smallest matters turn into big fights, making them the most famous rival families in Onjeong. This is a family growth drama about these two families as they unravel their long held misunderstandings, heal their wounds, learn to love one another, and are reborn as one family.

programme.title: Golden Chicken 2
programme.desc: Set in the year 2046, 82-year-old Golden Chicken Ah Gum spots a heartbroken man planning to take memory loss-pills. She begins to recap her life story starting in 2003.

programme.title: Bad Education (Director's Cut)
programme.desc: On the night of their high school graduation, three juvenile delinquents find themselves getting drunk at their regular hangout, throwing beer bottles and enjoying the abuse hurled at them by nearby residents. But for these young men about to enter a new chapter of life, this little bit of chaos is nowhere near enough to farewell their dying youth. Before dawn, they decide to share their deepest, darkest secret with one another. After all, only true “bros” are qualified to know their most unspeakable deed...

programme.title: Adventure of The King
programme.desc: Emperor Zhengde of the Ming Dynasty is young and playful, privately escapes from Palace to avoid the appointed marriage. He loses his memory by accident and luckily comes across Ms. Li to take care him. Prince Ningxia takes this opportunity to rebel the kingdom and catch the emperor to execute him immediately at the execution ground. At a critical time, three entourages rescue the Emperor and the prince Ningxia is arrested. However, Ms Li has refused to get marriage with the emperor due to his cheating on her love feelings.

programme.title: Napping Kid
programme.desc: Siu-yu, a financial analyst who has been working to complete a budget analyst for an investment bank, finds that a file containing confidential information has been mysteriously deleted. Soon after, her boss, John, receives a ransom email from someone called K Kidnapper, demanding just $190,000 worth of ransom. The ransom must be paid in 3 days, otherwise they will share the information to public. Under a detective's secret investigation, everyone could be the suspect...

programme.title: Three Of A Kind
programme.desc: Novelist Ngan is leading a comfortable life living on the royalties. He has now placed all his attention onto his daughter Sophia, who has reached a suitable age for marriage...

programme.title: Love, Life and Goldfish
programme.desc: Makoto Kashiba is angry and depressed after losing his job as an elite banker and being sent to the countryside. By chance (Or is it fate?) he meets a beautiful girl, Kitsuno. However, the man she's in love with is master pianist and goldfish catcher, Noboru Oji. Bonds between them form, and a love triangle begins...

American Greed
programme.desc: “American Greed” goes inside the dark side of the American Dream - where money seduces, power corrupts, and smooth criminals will stop at nothing to get rich.

programme.title: CNBC Meets
programme.desc: Hosted by Tania Bryer, “CNBC Meets” is an intimate interview series that takes viewers inside the lives and legacies of trailblazers across business, entertainment, sport and politics. Each episode offers rare access to their homes, offices and empires - uncovering the ambitions, challenges and entrepreneurial mindsets that shaped their success and continue to drive them forward.

programme.title: Leaders Playbook
programme.desc: Through candid, in-depth interviews with America's top CEOs, CNBC's Senior Media & Tech Correspondent Julia Boorstin explores the leadership philosophies, strategic decisions and personal decisions that have shaped today's most influential companies.

The program captures breaking business news as it unfolds and tracks pre market equity moves, commodity swings, U.S. futures, and overnight action across global markets.

programme.title: US Squawk Box
programme.desc: “Squawk Box” is the ultimate pre-market morning news and talk program, where the biggest names in business and politics tell their most important stories. programme.title: CNBC Meets
programme.desc: Hosted by Tania Bryer, “CNBC Meets” is an intimate interview series that takes viewers inside the lives and legacies of trailblazers across business, entertainment, sport and politics. Each episode offers rare access to their homes, offices and empires - uncovering the ambitions, challenges and entrepreneurial mindsets that shaped their success and continue to drive them forward.
